opportunities.web_prompt:
# Lead Generation Website Build — Solar panel installation in Modesto CA

## Overview
Build a high-converting, mobile-first lead generation website for **Solar panel installation** targeting **Modesto CA**. This is a Rank & Rent site designed to capture leads and forward them to a local service provider for a monthly fee of **$2,500**.

## Target Market
- **Location:** Modesto CA
- **Service:** Solar panel installation
- **Average Job Value:** $32,500
- **Urgency Level:** 3/10 (Standard — 24-48hr response)
- **Page Type:** installation_service

## Primary Keywords to Target
- Main: "Solar panel installation Modesto CA"
- Secondary: "best Solar panel installation near me", "Solar panel installation company Modesto CA", "affordable Solar panel installation Modesto CA"
- Long-tail: "Solar panel installation cost Modesto CA", "Solar panel installation reviews Modesto CA", "how much does Solar panel installation cost in Modesto CA"

## Domain
**Primary:** solarpanelinstallationmodestoca.com
(Verify availability before building)

## Page Structure
### Required Pages
1. **Homepage** — Hero + trust signals + service overview + CTA + FAQ
2. **Services** — Detailed service page with pricing context
3. **About** — Company story, credentials, service area
4. **Contact** — Form + phone + map + hours
5. **Areas We Serve** — List of suburbs/neighborhoods in Modesto CA
6. **Blog** — 3-5 seed articles targeting long-tail keywords

### Homepage Sections (Top to Bottom)
1. **Sticky Header** — Logo + Phone number (click-to-call) + CTA button
2. **Hero Section** — H1: "Solar panel installation in Modesto CA" + subheadline with benefit + 2 CTAs (Free Estimate / Schedule Consultation)
3. **Trust Bar** — 3 trust badges (e.g., "Licensed & Insured", "Same Day Service", "Free Estimates")
4. **Services Grid** — 3-6 service cards with icons
5. **Why Choose Us** — 3-4 differentiators with icons
6. **Social Proof** — Testimonials (use realistic placeholder names/cities)
7. **FAQ Accordion** — 5-7 common questions (great for SEO + voice search)
8. **CTA Banner** — Secondary conversion push
9. **Footer** — Full nav + contact + service areas + social links

## Design Requirements
- **Style:** Clean, professional, high-trust. Avoid templates.
- **Colors:** Blue + white + orange accents (proven conversion colors)
- **Typography:** Sans-serif, large readable text, clear hierarchy
- **Mobile:** 70%+ traffic will be mobile — optimize for thumbs, click-to-call prominent
- **Speed:** Target <2s load time. Optimize images, minify CSS/JS
- **Accessibility:** WCAG 2.1 AA compliant

## Conversion Optimization
- **Above the fold:** Phone number + form visible without scrolling
- **Click-to-call:** Every phone number is a tap-to-call link
- **Form:** Name + Phone + Service Needed + Address (4 fields max)
- **Trust signals:** Portfolio gallery, manufacturer certifications, warranty info, financing available
- **Urgency:** Same Day Appointments Available
- **Social proof:** 3+ testimonials with photos, star ratings
- **Risk reversal:** "Free Quote", "No Obligation", "Satisfaction Guaranteed"

## SEO Requirements
- **Meta:** Unique title + description for every page
- **Schema:** LocalBusiness structured data with Modesto CA address
- **H1:** Exactly "Solar panel installation Modesto CA" on homepage
- **Internal linking:** Every page links to contact page
- **Image alt text:** Descriptive, keyword-rich
- **URL structure:** /solar-panel-installation-modesto-ca/
- **Local content:** Mention specific neighborhoods, landmarks, weather/seasonal context for Modesto CA
- **FAQ Schema:** Mark up FAQ section for rich snippets

## Technical Stack
- **Static HTML/CSS/JS** (no CMS needed for lead gen)
- **Form handling:** Use Formspree, Basin, or similar (forward to email)
- **Analytics:** Google Analytics 4 + Google Search Console
- **Hosting:** Netlify, Vercel, or Cloudflare Pages (free SSL + CDN)
- **Domain:** Connect to solarpanelinstallationmodestoca.com via DNS

## Lead Forwarding Setup
- Form submissions → Email to [your email]
- Phone number → Forward to [client's phone] via Google Voice or similar
- Set up tracking: Use unique phone number per site to measure call volume

## Content Guidelines
- **Tone:** Professional but approachable
- **Length:** 800-1200 words on homepage, 500+ on service pages
- **FAQ Questions:**
  1. "How much does Solar panel installation cost in Modesto CA?"
  2. "How long does Solar panel installation take?"
  3. "Do you offer free estimates?"
  4. "Are you licensed and insured?"
  5. "What areas do you serve?"
  6. "Do you offer emergency Solar panel installation?"
  7. "What payment options do you accept?"

## Deliverables
1. Complete static website (HTML/CSS/JS)
2. Responsive design (mobile-first)
3. Contact form with validation
4. Google Analytics installed
5. Search Console submitted
6. LocalBusiness schema markup
7. 5 blog article drafts (300-500 words each)
8. README with deployment instructions

## Success Metrics
- **Target:** First lead within 30 days of going live
- **Goal:** 5+ leads/month within 90 days
- **Monthly Fee:** $2,500/month from client



---
**Budget Estimate:** $200-500 for initial build (one-time)
**Monthly Maintenance:** $50-100 (content updates, monitoring)

2. **Services** — Detailed service page with pricing context
3. **About** — Company story, credentials, service area
4. **Contact** — Form + phone + map + hours
5. **Areas We Serve** — List of suburbs/neighborhoods in Richardson TX
6. **Blog** — 3-5 seed articles targeting long-tail keywords

### Homepage Sections (Top to Bottom)
1. **Sticky Header** — Logo + Phone number (click-to-call) + CTA button
2. **Hero Section** — H1: "Epoxy flooring in Richardson TX" + subheadline with benefit + 2 CTAs (Free Consultation / Get Started)
3. **Trust Bar** — 3 trust badges (e.g., "Licensed & Insured", "Same Day Service", "Free Estimates")
4. **Services Grid** — 3-6 service cards with icons
5. **Why Choose Us** — 3-4 differentiators with icons
6. **Social Proof** — Testimonials (use realistic placeholder names/cities)
7. **FAQ Accordion** — 5-7 common questions (great for SEO + voice search)
8. **CTA Banner** — Secondary conversion push
9. **Footer** — Full nav + contact + service areas + social links

## Design Requirements
- **Style:** Clean, professional, high-trust. Avoid templates.
- **Colors:** Blue + white + orange accents (proven conversion colors)
- **Typography:** Sans-serif, large readable text, clear hierarchy
- **Mobile:** 70%+ traffic will be mobile — optimize for thumbs, click-to-call prominent
- **Speed:** Target <2s load time. Optimize images, minify CSS/JS
- **Accessibility:** WCAG 2.1 AA compliant

## Conversion Optimization
- **Above the fold:** Phone number + form visible without scrolling
- **Click-to-call:** Every phone number is a tap-to-call link
- **Form:** Name + Phone + Service Needed + Address (4 fields max)
- **Trust signals:** Credentials, testimonials, process explanation, FAQ section
- **Urgency:** Same Day Appointments Available
- **Social proof:** 3+ testimonials with photos, star ratings
- **Risk reversal:** "Free Quote", "No Obligation", "Satisfaction Guaranteed"

## SEO Requirements
- **Meta:** Unique title + description for every page
- **Schema:** LocalBusiness structured data with Richardson TX address
- **H1:** Exactly "Epoxy flooring Richardson TX" on homepage
- **Internal linking:** Every page links to contact page
- **Image alt text:** Descriptive, keyword-rich
- **URL structure:** /epoxy-flooring-richardson-tx/
- **Local content:** Mention specific neighborhoods, landmarks, weather/seasonal context for Richardson TX
- **FAQ Schema:** Mark up FAQ section for rich snippets

## Technical Stack
- **Static HTML/CSS/JS** (no CMS needed for lead gen)
- **Form handling:** Use Formspree, Basin, or similar (forward to email)
- **Analytics:** Google Analytics 4 + Google Search Console
- **Hosting:** Netlify, Vercel, or Cloudflare Pages (free SSL + CDN)
- **Domain:** Connect to epoxyflooringrichardsontx.com via DNS

## Lead Forwarding Setup
- Form submissions → Email to [your email]
- Phone number → Forward to [client's phone] via Google Voice or similar
- Set up tracking: Use unique phone number per site to measure call volume

## Content Guidelines
- **Tone:** Professional but approachable
- **Length:** 800-1200 words on homepage, 500+ on service pages
- **FAQ Questions:**
  1. "How much does Epoxy flooring cost in Richardson TX?"
  2. "How long does Epoxy flooring take?"
  3. "Do you offer free estimates?"
  4. "Are you licensed and insured?"
  5. "What areas do you serve?"
  6. "Do you offer emergency Epoxy flooring?"
  7. "What payment options do you accept?"

## Deliverables
1. Complete static website (HTML/CSS/JS)
2. Responsive design (mobile-first)
3. Contact form with validation
4. Google Analytics installed
5. Search Console submitted
6. LocalBusiness schema markup
7. 5 blog article drafts (300-500 words each)
8. README with deployment instructions

## Success Metrics
- **Target:** First lead within 30 days of going live
- **Goal:** 5+ leads/month within 90 days
- **Monthly Fee:** $2,500/month from client



---
**Budget Estimate:** $200-500 for initial build (one-time)
**Monthly Maintenance:** $50-100 (content updates, monitoring)
